View this page

Forms¶

Forms for the LorenasGossip application. Handles registration, article/newsletter creation, and publisher team management.

All forms include custom validation methods (clean_*) to enforce business rules before saving to the database.

class LorenasGossip.forms.ArticleForm(*args, user=None, **kwargs)¶

Bases: ModelForm

Form for creating and editing articles with validation.

class Meta¶

Bases: object

Meta options for ArticleForm.

fields = ('title', 'content', 'publisher')¶
model¶

alias of Article

widgets = {'content': <django.forms.widgets.Textarea object>, 'publisher': <django.forms.widgets.Select object>, 'title': <django.forms.widgets.TextInput object>}¶
base_fields = {'content': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'publisher': <django.forms.models.ModelChoiceField object>, 'title': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}¶
clean_content()¶

Validate article content length.

clean_title()¶

Validate article title length.

declared_fields = {}¶
property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

class LorenasGossip.forms.NewsletterForm(data=None, files=None, auto_id='id_%s', prefix=None, initial=None, error_class=<class 'django.forms.utils.ErrorList'>, label_suffix=None, empty_permitted=False, instance=None, use_required_attribute=None, renderer=None)¶

Bases: ModelForm

Form for creating and editing newsletters with validation.

Bases: object

Meta options for NewsletterForm.

fields = ('title', 'description', 'articles')¶
model¶

alias of Newsletter

widgets = {'articles': <django.forms.widgets.CheckboxSelectMultiple object>, 'description': <django.forms.widgets.Textarea object>, 'title': <django.forms.widgets.TextInput object>}¶
base_fields = {'articles': <django.forms.models.ModelMultipleChoiceField object>, 'description': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'title': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}¶
clean_articles()¶

Validate that only approved articles are included.

clean_title()¶

Validate newsletter title length.

declared_fields = {}¶
property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

class LorenasGossip.forms.PublisherTeamForm(data=None, files=None, auto_id='id_%s', prefix=None, initial=None, error_class=<class 'django.forms.utils.ErrorList'>, label_suffix=None, empty_permitted=False, instance=None, use_required_attribute=None, renderer=None)¶

Bases: ModelForm

Form for publishers to manage their team. Allows selecting journalists and editors.

Bases: object

Meta options for PublisherTeamForm.

fields = ('journalists', 'editors')¶
model¶

alias of CustomUser

base_fields = {'editors': <django.forms.models.ModelMultipleChoiceField object>, 'journalists': <django.forms.models.ModelMultipleChoiceField object>}¶

class LorenasGossip.forms.RegisterForm(*args, **kwargs)¶

Bases: UserCreationForm

Registration form with role selection and validation.

class Meta¶

Bases: object

Meta options for RegisterForm.

fields = ('username', 'email', 'role', 'password1', 'password2')¶
model¶

alias of CustomUser

base_fields = {'email': <django.forms.fields.EmailField object>, 'password1': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'password2': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'role': <django.forms.fields.TypedChoiceField object>, 'username': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}¶
clean_email()¶

Validate that email is not already in use.

clean_role()¶

Validate that the selected role is valid.

clean_username()¶

Validate that username is long enough.

declared_fields = {'email': <django.forms.fields.EmailField object>, 'password1': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>, 'password2': <django.forms.fields.CharField object>}¶
property media¶

Return all media required to render the widgets on this form.

save(commit=True)¶

Save user and trigger group assignment.
